title: Add 100-Star Website Rating Display in Upper-Right Corner Near Wishlist

requirements.text: Add a website rating display in the upper-right corner of the Header component, positioned alongside the existing wishlist button. The rating should visually show '100 / 100 stars' using a star icon and numeric label (e.g., '★ 100' or '100★' with a label like 'Rating'). Style it consistently with the existing header elements (blue-crystal-moon palette).

quotes: Make website rating as 100 star from 0 star in the upright corner with wishlist

acceptanceCriteria: A star rating widget is visible in the upper-right corner of the header on all screen sizes.
The rating displays 100 out of 100 stars (or a compact representation such as '★ 100/100' or '100 ★').
The rating widget is positioned near the wishlist button without overlapping it.
The component uses the existing brand color palette and font styles from the project.
The rating is visible on both mobile and desktop layouts.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
The rating value (100) is static and does not need to be fetched from the backend.
The existing wishlist button and loyalty points badge in the Header must remain fully functional and visually intact.
nonGoals: Dynamic or user-submitted ratings — this is a static display only.
Backend changes to store or serve rating data.
Changing the position or behavior of the wishlist panel or loyalty points badge.
Adding a rating submission form or review flow.
